changeSet.author: said-murad

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus'

changeSet.comment: Insert Mindray BC-3000 Plus hematology analyzer

column.name: analyzer_type_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer_type WHERE name = 'HEMATOLOGY')

changeSet.author: said-murad

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.analyzer_test_map atm JOIN clinlims.analyzer a ON atm.analyzer_id = a.id WHERE a.name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus'

changeSet.comment: Insert test mappings for Mindray BC-3000 Plus hematology analyzer

column.name: analyzer_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus')

column.name: test_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE description = 'White Blood Cell Count' LIMIT 1)

column.name: analyzer_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus')

column.name: test_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE description = 'Lymphocyte Count' LIMIT 1)

column.name: analyzer_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus')

column.name: test_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE description = 'Mid-cell Fraction Count' LIMIT 1)

column.name: analyzer_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus')

column.name: test_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE description = 'Granulocyte Count' LIMIT 1)

column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus')

column.name: test_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE description = 'Lymphocyte Percentage' LIMIT 1)

column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus')

column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE description = 'Mid-cell Fraction Percentage' LIMIT 1)

column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus')

column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE description = 'Granulocyte Percentage' LIMIT 1)

column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus')

column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE description = 'Red Blood Cell Count' LIMIT 1)

column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus')

column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE description = 'Hemoglobin' LIMIT 1)

column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus')

column.name: test_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE description = 'Mean Corpuscular Hemoglobin Concentration' LIMIT 1)

column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus')

column.name: test_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE description = 'Mean Corpuscular Volume' LIMIT 1)

column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus')

column.name: test_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE description = 'Mean Corpuscular Hemoglobin' LIMIT 1)

column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus')

column.name: test_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE description = 'Red Cell Distribution Width (CV)' LIMIT 1)

column.name: analyzer_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus')

column.name: test_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE description = 'Hematocrit' LIMIT 1)

column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus')

column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE description = 'Platelet Distribution Width' LIMIT 1)

column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus')

column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE description = 'Plateletcrit' LIMIT 1)

column.name: analyzer_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus')

column.name: test_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.test WHERE description = 'Red Cell Distribution Width (SD)' LIMIT 1)

delete.where: analyzer_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.analyzer WHERE name = 'Mindray BC-3000 Plus')
